monsters.description: A large bear with thick fur and powerful claws.

All bramble tokens can be removed by succeeding on a Finesse Roll (12 + the number of bramble tokens) or dealing Major or greater damage to the Swarm. If bramble tokens are removed from a target using a Finesse Roll, a number of Tangle Bramble Minions spawn within Melee range equal to the number of tokens removed.

monsters.description: A cube-shaped construct with a different rune on each of their six sides.

feature.name: Relentless (2) - Passive
feature.text: The Box can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Randomized Tactics - Action
feature.text:
**Mark a Stress** and roll a **d6**. The Box uses the corresponding move:

- 1. _Mana Beam._ The Box fires a searing beam. Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, deal **2d10+2** magic damage.
- 2. _Fire Jets._ The Box shoots into the air, spinning and releasing jets of flame. Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Box succeeds against take **2d8** physical damage.
- 3. _Trample._ The Box rockets around erratically. Make an attack against all PCs within Close range. Targets the Box succeeds against take **1d6+5** physical damage and are _Vulnerable_ until their next roll with Hope.
- 4. _Shocking Gas._ The Box sprays out a silver gas sparking with lightning. All targets within Close range must succeed on a Finesse Reaction Roll or mark 3 Stress.
- 5. _Stunning Clap._ The Box leaps and their sides clap, creating a small sonic boom. All targets within Very Close range must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or become _Vulnerable_ until the cube is defeated.
- 6. _Psionic Whine._ The Box releases a cluster of mechanical bees whose buzz rattles mortal minds. All targets within Close range must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll or take **2d4+9** direct magic damage.

feature.name: Overcharge - Reaction
feature.text: Before rolling damage for the Box's attack, you can **mark a Stress** to add a **d6** to the damage roll. Additionally, you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Death Quake - Reaction
feature.text: When the Box marks their last HP, the magic powering them ruptures in an explosion of force. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or take **2d8+1** magic damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Change tactics, trample foes, wait in disguise
monsters.name: Battle Box

monsters.description: An undead figure wearing a heavy leather coat, with searching eyes and a casually cruel demeanor.

feature.name: Terrifying - Passive
feature.text: When the Hunter makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Deathlock - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to curse a target within Very Close range with a necrotic _Deathlock_ until the end of the scene. Attacks made by the Hunter against a _Deathlocked_ target deal direct damage. The Hunter can only maintain one _Deathlock_ at a time.

feature.name: Inevitable Death - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to spotlight **1d4** allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

feature.name: Rampage - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 1d6)
feature.text: When the Hunter is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, move the Hunter in a straight line to a point within Far range and make an attack against all targets in their path. Targets the Hunter succeeds against take **2d8+2** physical damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Devour, hunt, track
monsters.name: Mortal Hunter

monsters.description: A high-ranking courtier with the ear of the local nobility.

feature.name: Devastating Retort - Passive
feature.text: A PC who rolls less than 17 on an action roll targeting the Advisor must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Bend Ears - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to influence an NPC within Melee range with whispered words. That target's opinion on one matter shifts toward the Advisor's preference unless it is in direct opposition to the target's motives.

feature.name: Scapegoat - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to convince a crowd or notable individual that one person or group is responsible for some problem facing the target. The target becomes hostile to the scapegoat until convinced of their innocence with a successful Presence Roll (17).

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Curry favor, manufacture evidence, scheme
monsters.name: Royal Advisor

monsters.description: A clandestine leader with a direct channel to the Fallen Gods.

feature.name: Seize Your Moment - Action
feature.text: **Spend 2 Fear** to spotlight **1d4** allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

feature.name: Our Master's Will - Reaction
feature.text: When you spotlight an ally within Far range, **mark a Stress** to gain a Fear.

feature.name: Summoning Ritual - Reaction: Countdown (6)
feature.text: When the Secret-Keeper is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When they mark HP, tick down this countdown by the number of HP marked. When it triggers, summon a Minor Demon who appears at Close range.

feature.name: Fallen Hounds - Reaction
feature.text: Once per scene, when the Secret-Keeper marks 2 or more HP, you can **mark a Stress** to summon a Demonic Hound Pack, which appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Amass great power, plot, take command
monsters.name: Secret-Keeper

monsters.description: A large aquatic predator, always on the move.

feature.name: Terrifying - Passive
feature.text: When the Shark makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Rending Bite - Passive
feature.text: When the Shark makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.

feature.name: Blood in the Water - Reaction
feature.text: When a creature within Close range of the Shark marks HP from another creature's attack, you can **mark a Stress** to immediately spotlight the Shark, moving them into Melee range of the target and making a standard attack.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Find the blood, isolate prey, target the weak
monsters.name: Shark

monsters.description: A half-fish person with shimmering scales and an irresistible voice.

feature.name: Captive Audience - Passive
feature.text: If the Siren makes a standard attack against a target _Entranced_ by their song, the attack deals **2d10+1** damage instead of their standard damage.

feature.name: Enchanting Song - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to sing a song that affects all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or become _Entranced_ until they mark 2 Stress. Other Sirens within Close range of the target can **mark a Stress** to each add a +1 bonus to the Difficulty of the reaction roll. While _Entranced_, a target can't act and is _Vulnerable_.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Consume, lure prey, subdue with song
monsters.name: Siren

monsters.description: A ghostly fighter with an ethereal bow, unable to move on while their charge is vulnerable.

feature.name: Ghost - Passive
feature.text: The Archer has resistance to physical damage. **Mark a Stress** to move up to Close range through solid objects.

feature.name: Pick Your Target - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to make an attack within Far range against a PC who is within Very Close range of at least two other PCs. On a success, the target takes **2d8+12** physical damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Move through solid objects, stay out of the fray, rehash old battles
monsters.name: Spectral Archer

monsters.description: A ghostly commander leading their troops beyond death.

feature.name: Ghost - Passive
feature.text: The Captain has resistance to physical damage. **Mark a Stress** to move up to Close range through solid objects.

feature.name: Unending Battle - Action
feature.text: **Spend 2 Fear** to return up to **1d4+1** defeated Spectral allies to the battle at the points where they first appeared (with no marked HP or Stress).

feature.name: Hold Fast - Reaction
feature.text: When the Captain's Spectral allies are forced to make a reaction roll, you can **mark a Stress** to give those allies a +2 bonus to the roll.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Captain makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Move through solid objects, rally troops, rehash old battles
monsters.name: Spectral Captain

monsters.description: A ghostly fighter with spears and swords, anchored by duty.

feature.name: Ghost - Passive
feature.text: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. **Mark a Stress** to move up to Close range through solid objects.

feature.name: Grave Blade - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal **2d10+6** physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Move through solid objects, protect treasure, rehash old battles
monsters.name: Spectral Guardian

monsters.description: A skilled espionage agent with a knack for being in the right place to overhear secrets.

feature.name: Gathering Secrets - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to describe how the Spy knows a secret about a PC in the scene.

feature.name: Fly on the Wall - Reaction
feature.text: When a PC or group is discussing something sensitive, you can **mark a Stress** to reveal that the Spy is present in the scene, observing them. If the Spy escapes the scene to report their findings, you gain **1d4** Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Cut and run, disguise appearance, eavesdrop
monsters.name: Spy

monsters.description: A prowling hunter, like a slinking mountain lion, with a slate-gray stone body.

feature.name: Stonestrider - Passive
feature.text: The Stonewraith can move through stone and earth as easily as air. While within stone or earth, they are _Hidden_ and immune to all damage.

feature.name: Rocky Ambush - Action
feature.text: While _Hidden_, **mark a Stress** to leap into Melee range with a target within Very Close range. The target must succeed on an Agility or Instinct Reaction Roll (15) or take **2d8** physical damage and become temporarily _Restrained_.

feature.name: Avalanche Roar - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to roar while within a cave and cause a cave-in. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or take **2d10** physical damage. The rubble can be cleared with a Progress Countdown (8).

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Stonewraith makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Defend territory, isolate prey, stalk
monsters.name: Stonewraith

monsters.description: A battle-hardened mage trained in destructive magic.

feature.name: Battle Teleport - Passive
feature.text: Before or after making a standard attack, you can **mark a Stress** to teleport to a location within Far range.

feature.name: Refresh Warding Sphere - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to refresh the Wizard's "Warding Sphere" reaction.

feature.name: Eruption - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** and choose a point within Far range. A Very Close area around that point erupts into impassable terrain. All targets within that area must make an Agility Reaction Roll (14). Targets who fail take **2d10** physical damage and are thrown out of the area. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren't moved.

feature.name: Arcane Artillery - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to unleash a precise hail of magical blasts. All targets in the scene must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **2d12** magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

feature.name: Warding Sphere - Reaction
feature.text: When the Wizard takes damage from an attack within Close range, deal **2d6** magic damage to the attacker. This reaction can't be used again until the Wizard refreshes it with their "Refresh Warding Sphere" action.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Develop new spells, seek power, shatter formations
monsters.name: War Wizard

monsters.description: A regal cloaked monstrosity with circular horns adorned with treasure.

feature.name: Money Talks - Passive
feature.text: Attacks against the Demon are made with disadvantage unless the attacker spends a handful of gold. This Demon starts with a number of handfuls equal to the number of PCs. When a target marks HP from the Demon's standard attack, they can spend a handful of gold instead of marking HP (1 handful per HP). Add a handful of gold to the Demon for each handful of gold spent by PCs on this feature.

feature.name: Numbers Must Go Up - Passive
feature.text: Add a bonus to the Demon's attack rolls equal to the number of handfuls of gold they have.

feature.name: Money Is Time - Action
feature.text: **Spend 3 handfuls of gold (or a Fear)** to spotlight **1d4+1** allies.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Consume, fuel greed, sow dissent
monsters.name: Demon of Avarice

monsters.description: A cloaked demon-creature with long limbs, seeping shadows.

feature.name: Depths of Despair - Passive
feature.text: The Demon deals double damage to PCs with 0 Hope.

feature.name: Your Struggle Is Pointless - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to weigh down the spirits of all PCs within Far range. All targets affected replace their Hope Die with a **d8** until they roll a success with Hope or their next rest.

feature.name: Your Friends Will Fail You - Reaction
feature.text: When a PC fails with Fear, you can **mark a Stress** to cause all other PCs within Close range to lose a Hope.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Demon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Make fear contagious, stick to the shadows, undermine resolve
monsters.name: Demon of Despair

monsters.description: A perfectly beautiful and infinitely cruel demon with a gleaming spear and elegant robes.

feature.name: Terrifying - Passive
feature.text: When the Demon makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range must lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Double or Nothing - Passive
feature.text: When a PC within Far range fails a roll, they can choose to reroll their Fear Die and take the new result. If they still fail, they mark 2 Stress and the Demon clears a Stress.

feature.name: Unparalleled Skill - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to deal the Demon's standard attack damage to a target within Close range.

feature.name: The Root of Villainy - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to spotlight two other Demons within Far range.

feature.name: You Pale in Comparison - Reaction
feature.text: When a PC fails a roll within Close range of the Demon, they must mark a Stress.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Condescend, declare premature victory, prove superiority
monsters.name: Demon of Hubris

monsters.description: A fickle creature of spindly limbs and insatiable desires.

feature.name: Unprotected Mind - Passive
feature.text: The Demon's standard attack deals direct damage.

feature.name: My Turn - Reaction
feature.text: When the Demon marks HP from an attack, **spend a number of Fear equal to the HP marked by the Demon** to cause the attacker to mark the same number of HP.

feature.name: Rivalry - Reaction
feature.text: When a creature within Close range takes damage from a different adversary, you can **mark a Stress** to add a **d4** to the damage roll.

feature.name: What's Yours Is Mine - Reaction
feature.text: When a PC takes Severe damage within Very Close range of the Demon, you can **spend a Fear** to cause the target to make a Finesse Reaction Roll. On a failure, the Demon seizes one item or consumable of their choice from the target's inventory.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Join in on others' success, take what belongs to others, hold grudges
monsters.name: Demon of Jealousy

monsters.description: A hulking demon with boulder-sized fists, driven by endless rage.

feature.name: Anger Unrelenting - Passive
feature.text: The Demon's attacks deal direct damage.

feature.name: Battle Lust - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to boil the blood of all PCs within Far range. They use a d20 as their Fear Die until the end of the scene.

feature.name: Retaliation - Reaction
feature.text: When the Demon takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can **mark a Stress** to make a standard attack against the attacker.

feature.name: Blood and Souls - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 6)
feature.text: Activate the first time an attack is made within sight of the Demon. It ticks down when a PC takes a violent action. When it triggers, summon **1d4** Minor Demons, who appear at Close range.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Fuel anger, impress rivals, wreak havoc
monsters.name: Demon of Wrath

monsters.description: A wide-winged pet endlessly loyal to their vampire owner.

feature.name: Flying - Passive
feature.text: While flying, the Bat gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.

feature.name: Screech - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to send a high-pitch screech out toward all targets in front of the Bat within Far range. Those targets must mark **1d4** Stress.

feature.name: Guardian - Reaction
feature.text: When an allied Vampire marks HP, you can **mark a Stress** to fly into Melee range of the attacker and make an attack with advantage against them. On a success, deal **2d6+2** physical damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Dive-bomb, hide, protect leader
monsters.name: Dire Bat

monsters.description: A nature spirit in the form of a humanoid tree.

feature.name: Bramble Patch - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to target a point within Far range. Create a patch of thorns that covers an area within Close range of that point. All targets within that area take **2d6+2** physical damage when they act. A target must succeed on a Finesse Roll or deal more than 20 damage to the Dryad with an attack to leave the area.

feature.name: Grow Saplings - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to grow three Treant Sapling Minions, who appear at Close range and immediately take the spotlight.

feature.name: We Are All One - Reaction
feature.text: When an ally dies within Close range, you can **spend a Fear** to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress as the fallen ally's life force is returned to the forest.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Command, cultivate, drive out, preserve the forest
monsters.name: Dryad

monsters.description: A blazing mote of elemental fire.

feature.name: Minion (9) - Passive
feature.text: The Elemental is defeated when they take any damage. For every 9 damage a PC deals to the Elemental, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

feature.name: Group Attack - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to choose a target and spotlight all Elemental Sparks within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Blast, consume, gain mass
monsters.name: Elemental Spark

monsters.description: A living landslide of boulders and dust, as large as a house.

feature.name: Slow - Passive
feature.text: When you spotlight the Elemental and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Elemental and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.

feature.name: Crushing Blows - Passive
feature.text: When the Elemental makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.

feature.name: Immovable Object - Passive
feature.text: An attack that would move the Elemental moves them two fewer ranges (for example, Far becomes Very Close). When the Elemental takes physical damage, reduce it by 7.

feature.name: Rockslide - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to create a rockslide that buries the land in front of Elemental within Close range with rockfall. All targets in this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll (19). Targets who fail take **2d12+5** physical damage and become _Vulnerable_ until their next roll with Hope. Targets who succeed take half damage.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Elemental makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Avalanche, knock over, pummel
monsters.name: Greater Earth Elemental

monsters.description: A huge living wave that crashes down upon enemies.

feature.name: Water Jet - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to attack a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal **2d4+7** physical damage and the target's next action has disadvantage. On a failure, the target must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Drowning Embrace - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Elemental succeeds against become _Restrained_ and _Vulnerable_ as they begin drowning. A target can break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll.

feature.name: High Tide - Reaction
feature.text: When the Elemental makes a successful standard attack, you can **mark a Stress** to knock the target back to Close range.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Deluge, disperse, drown
monsters.name: Greater Water Elemental

monsters.description: A translucent green mound of acid taller than most humans.

feature.name: Slow - Passive
feature.text: When you spotlight the Ooze and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Ooze and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.

feature.name: Acidic Form - Passive
feature.text: When the Ooze makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.

feature.name: Envelop - Action
feature.text: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the Ooze _Envelops_ them and the target must mark 2 Stress. While _Enveloped_, the target must mark an additional Stress every time they make an action roll. When the Ooze takes Severe damage, all _Enveloped_ targets are freed and the condition is cleared.

feature.name: Split - Reaction
feature.text: When the Ooze has 4 or more HP marked, you can **spend a Fear** to split them into two Green Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Camouflage, creep up, envelop, multiply
monsters.name: Huge Green Ooze

monsters.description: A quadrupedal scaled beast with multiple long-necked heads, each filled with menacing fangs.

feature.name: Many-Headed Menace - Passive
feature.text: The Hydra begins with three heads and can have up to five. When the Hydra takes Major or greater damage, they lose a head.

feature.name: Relentless (X) - Passive
feature.text: The Hydra can be spotlighted X times per GM turn, where X is the Hydra's number of heads. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Regeneration - Action
feature.text: If the Hydra has any marked HP, **spend a Fear** to clear a HP and grow two heads.

feature.name: Terrifying Chorus - Action
feature.text: All PCs within Far range lose 2 Hope.

feature.name: Magical Weakness - Reaction
feature.text: When the Hydra takes magic damage, they become _Dazed_ until the next roll with Fear. While _Dazed_, they can't use their Regeneration action but are immune to magic damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Devour, regenerate, terrify
monsters.name: Hydra

monsters.description: The sovereign ruler of a nation, wreathed in the privilege of tradition and wielding unmatched power in their domain.

feature.name: Execute Them! - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** per PC in the party to have the group condemned for crimes real or imagined. A PC who succeeds on a Presence Roll can demand trial by combat or another special form of trial.

feature.name: Crownsguard - Action
feature.text: Once per scene, **mark a Stress** to summon six Tier 3 Minions, who appear at Close range to enforce the Monarch's will.

feature.name: Casus Belli - Reaction: Long-Term Countdown (8)
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to activate after the Monarch's desire for war is first revealed. When it triggers, the Monarch has a reason to rally the nation to war and the support to act on that reason. You gain **1d4** Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Control vassals, destroy rivals, forge a legacy
monsters.name: Monarch

monsters.description: A knight with huge, majestic antlers wearing armor made of dangerous thorns.

feature.name: From Above - Passive
feature.text: When the Knight succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal **3d12+3** physical damage instead of their standard damage.

feature.name: Blade of the Forest - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take physical damage equal to **3d4** + the target's Major threshold.

feature.name: Thorny Armor - Reaction
feature.text: When the Knight takes damage from an attack within Melee range, you can **mark a Stress** to deal **1d10+5** physical damage to the attacker.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Isolate, maneuver, protect the forest, weed the unwelcome
monsters.name: Stag Knight

monsters.description: A sturdy animate old-growth tree.

feature.name: Just a Tree - Passive
feature.text: Before they make their first attack in a fight or after they become _Hidden_, the Treant is indistinguishable from other trees until they next act or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll to identify them.

feature.name: Seed Barrage - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** and make an attack against up to three targets within Close range, pummeling them with giant acorns. Targets the Treant succeeds against take **2d10+5** physical damage.

feature.name: Take Root - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to _Root_ the Treant in place. The Treant is _Restrained_ while _Rooted_, and can end this effect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, the Treant has resistance to physical damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Hide in plain sight, preserve the forest, root down, swing branches
monsters.name: Oak Treant

monsters.description: A captivating undead dressed in aristocratic finery.

feature.name: Terrifying - Passive
feature.text: When the Vampire makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Look into My Eyes - Passive
feature.text: A creature who moves into Melee range of the Vampire must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, you gain **1d4** Fear.

feature.name: Feed on Followers - Action
feature.text: When the Vampire is within Melee range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a HP. The Vampire then clears a HP.

feature.name: The Hunt Is On - Action
feature.text: **Spend 2 Fear** to summon **1d4** Vampires, who appear at Far range and immediately take the spotlight.

feature.name: Lifesuck - Reaction
feature.text: When the Vampire is spotlighted, roll a **d8**. On a result of 6 or higher, all targets within Very Close range must mark a HP.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Create thralls, charm, command, fly, intimidate
monsters.name: Head Vampire

monsters.description: A small, sentient tree sapling.

feature.name: Minion (6) - Passive
feature.text: The Sapling is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Sapling, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

feature.name: Group Attack - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to choose a target and spotlight all Treant Saplings within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 8 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Blend in, preserve the forest, pummel, surround
monsters.name: Treant Sapling

monsters.description: An intelligent undead with blood-stained lips and a predator's smile.

feature.name: Draining Bite - Action
feature.text: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal **5d4** physical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire then clears a HP.

feature.name: Mistform - Reaction
feature.text: When the Vampire takes physical damage, you can **spend a Fear** to take half damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Bite, charm, deceive, feed, intimidate
monsters.name: Vampire

monsters.description: A boxy, dust-covered construct with thick metallic swinging doors on their torso.

feature.name: Blocking Shield - Passive
feature.text: Creatures within Melee range of the Gaoler have disadvantage on attack rolls against them. Creatures trapped inside the Gaoler are immune to this feature.

feature.name: Lock Up - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target is _Restrained_ within the Gaoler until freed with a successful Strength Roll (18). While _Restrained_, the target can only attack the Gaoler.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Carry away, entrap, protect, pummel
monsters.name: Vault Guardian Gaoler

monsters.description: A dust-covered golden construct with boxy limbs and a huge mace for a hand.

feature.name: Kinetic Slam - Passive
feature.text: Targets who take damage from the Sentinel's standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.

feature.name: Box In - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to choose a target within Very Close range to focus on. That target has disadvantage on attack rolls when they're within Very Close range of the Sentinel. The Sentinel can only focus on one target at a time.

feature.name: Mana Bolt - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to lob explosive magic at a point within Far range. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **2d8+20** magic damage and are knocked back to Close range. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren't knocked back.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Sentinel makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Destroy at any cost, expunge, protect
monsters.name: Vault Guardian Sentinel

monsters.description: A massive living turret with reinforced armor and twelve pistondriven mechanical legs.

feature.name: Slow Firing - Passive
feature.text: When you spotlight the Turret and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't make a standard attack. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Turret and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can attack.

feature.name: Mark Target - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to _Mark_ a target within Far range until the Turret is destroyed or the _Marked_ target becomes _Hidden_. While the target is _Marked_, their Evasion is halved.

feature.name: Concentrate Fire - Reaction
feature.text: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Far range of the Turret, you can **mark a Stress** to add the Turret's standard attack damage to the damage roll.

feature.name: Detonation - Reaction
feature.text: When the Turret is destroyed, they explode. All targets within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **3d20** physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Concentrate fire, lock down, mark, protect
monsters.name: Vault Guardian Turret

monsters.description: A glacier-blue dragon with four powerful limbs and frost-tinged wings.

feature.name: Relentless (3) - Passive
feature.text: The Dragon can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Rend and Crush - Passive
feature.text: If a target damaged by the Dragon doesn't mark an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must mark a Stress.

feature.name: No Hope - Passive
feature.text: When a PC rolls with Fear while within Far range of the Dragon, they lose a Hope.

feature.name: Blizzard Breath - Action
feature.text: **Spend 2 Fear** to release an icy whorl in front of the Dragon within Close range. All targets in this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **4d6+5** magic damage and are _Restrained_ by ice until they break free with a successful Strength Roll. Targets who succeed must mark 2 Stress or take half damage.

feature.name: Avalanche - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to have the Dragon unleash a huge downfall of snow and ice, covering all other creatures within Far range. All targets within this area must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or be buried in snow and rocks, becoming _Vulnerable_ until they dig themselves out from the debris. For each PC that fails the reaction roll, you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Frozen Scales - Reaction
feature.text: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Dragon from within Very Close range, they must mark a Stress and become _Chilled_ until their next rest or they clear a Stress. While they are _Chilled_, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Dragon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Avalanche, defend lair, fly, freeze, defend what is mine, maul
monsters.name: Young Ice Dragon

monsters.description: A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.

feature.name: Dance of Death - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to spotlight **1d4** allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage, or full damage if you **spend a Fear**.

feature.name: Beam of Decay - Action

Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who marks 2 or more HP must also mark **2 Stress** and becomes _Vulnerable_ until they roll with Hope.

feature.name: Open the Gates of Death - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to summon a Zombie Legion, which appears at Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.

feature.name: Not Today, My Dears - Reaction
feature.text: When the Necromancer has marked 7 or more of their HP, you can **spend a Fear** to have them teleport away to a safe location to recover. A PC who succeeds on an Instinct Roll can trace the teleportation magic to their destination.

feature.name: Your Life Is Mine - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 2d6)
feature.text: When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more of their HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal **2d10+6** direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then **clears a number of Stress or HP** equal to the number of HP marked by the target from this attack.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Corrupt, decay, flee to fight another day, resurrect
monsters.name: Arch-Necromancer

monsters.description: A cursed soul bound to the Fallen's will.

feature.name: Minion (12) - Passive
feature.text: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

feature.name: Aura of Doom - Passive
feature.text: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.

feature.name: Group Attack - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to choose a target and spotlight all Fallen Shock Troops within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 12 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Crush, dominate, earn relief, punish
monsters.name: Fallen Shock Troop

monsters.description: A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.

feature.name: Conflagration - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to unleash an all-consuming firestorm and make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take **2d10+6** direct magic damage.

feature.name: Nightmare Tableau - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their worst fears. While trapped, the target is _Restrained_ and _Vulnerable_ until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Instinct Roll.

feature.name: Slippery - Reaction
feature.text: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack, they can teleport up to Far range.

feature.name: Shackles of Guilt - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 2d6)
feature.text: When the Sorcerer is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all targets within Far range become _Vulnerable_ and must mark a Stress as they relive their greatest regrets. A target can break free from their regret with a successful Presence or Strength Roll. When a PC fails to break free, they lose a Hope.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Acquire, dishearten, dominate, torment
monsters.name: Fallen Sorcerer

monsters.description: A Fallen God, wreathed in rage and resentment, bearing millennia of experience in breaking heroes' spirits.

feature.name: Relentless (2) - Passive
feature.text: The Realm-Breaker can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Firespite Plate Armor - Passive
feature.text: When the Realm-Breaker takes damage, reduce it by **2d10**.

feature.name: Tormenting Lash - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. When a target uses armor to reduce damage from this attack, they must mark 2 Armor Slots.

feature.name: All-Consuming Rage - Reaction: Countdown (Decreasing 8)
feature.text: When the Realm-Breaker is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, create a torrent of incarnate rage that rends flesh from bone. All targets within Far range must make a Presence Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **2d6+10** direct magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage. For each HP marked from this damage, summon a Fallen Shock Troop within Very Close range of the target who marked that HP. If the countdown ever decreases its maximum value to 0, the Realm-Breaker marks their remaining HP and all targets within Far range must mark all remaining HP and make a death move.

feature.name: Doombringer - Reaction
feature.text: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Realm-Breaker, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.

feature.name: I Have Never Known Defeat (Phase Change) - Reaction
feature.text: When the Realm-Breaker marks their last HP, replace them with the Undefeated Champion and immediately spotlight them.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Corrupt, dominate, punish, break the weak
monsters.name: Fallen Warlord: Realm-Breaker

monsters.description: That which only the most feared have a chance to fear.

feature.name: Faltering Armor - Passive

feature.name: Shattering Strike - Action

feature.name: Endless Legions - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.

feature.name: Circle of Defilement - Reaction: Countdown (1d8)
feature.text: When the Undefeated Champion is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, activate a magical circle covering an area within Far range of the Champion. A target within that area is _Vulnerable_ until they leave the circle. The circle can be removed by dealing Severe damage to the Undefeated Champion.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Doombringer - Reaction
feature.text: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope.

feature.name: Group Attack - Action

feature.name: We Are One - Action

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Enforce dogma, fly, pronounce judgment, smite

monsters.description: A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.

feature.name: Relentless (3) - Passive
feature.text: The Kraken can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Many Tentacles - Passive
feature.text: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make their standard attack against two targets within range.

feature.name: Boiling Blast - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to spew a line of boiling water at any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take **4d6+9** physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must also mark a Stress.

feature.name: Momentum - Reaction
feature.text: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Consume, crush, drown, grapple

feature.name: Terrifying - Passive
feature.text: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Walls Closing In - Passive
feature.text: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Far range of the Oracle, they must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Pronounce Fate - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to present a target within Far range with a vision of their personal nightmare. The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, they lose all Hope and take **2d20+4** direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.

feature.name: Summon Tormentors - Action
feature.text: Once per day, **spend 2 Fear** to summon **2d4** Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the PC's personal nightmares. They appear at Close range relative to that PC.

feature.name: Ominous Knowledge - Reaction
feature.text: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.

feature.name: Vengeful Fate - Reaction
feature.text: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can **mark a Stress** to knock the attacker back to Far range and deal **2d10+4** physical damage.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Change environment, condemn, dishearten, toss aside

feature.name: Disorienting Presence - Passive
feature.text: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain disadvantage on their next action roll and you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Reality Quake - Action

All targets within that area must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or become _Unstuck_ from reality until the end of the scene. When an _Unstuck_ target spends Hope or marks Armor Slots, HP, or Stress, they must double the amount spent or marked.

feature.name: Unreal Form - Reaction
feature.text: When the Abomination takes damage, reduce it by **1d20**. If the Abomination marks 1 or fewer Hit Points from a successful attack against them, you gain a Fear.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Demolish, devour, undermine
monsters.name: Outer Realms Abomination

feature.name: Will-Shattering Touch - Passive
feature.text: When a PC takes damage from the Corruptor, they lose a Hope.

feature.name: Disgorge Reality Flotsam - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to spew partially digested portions of consumed realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Confuse, distract, overwhelm

feature.name: Group Attack - Action

monsters.name: Outer Realms Thrall

feature.text: The Obsidian Predator can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Flying - Passive
feature.text: While flying, the Obsidian Predator gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.

feature.name: Obsidian Scales - Passive
feature.text: The Obsidian Predator is resistant to physical damage.

feature.name: Avalanche Tail - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take **4d6+4** physical damage and are knocked back to Far range and _Vulnerable_ until their next roll with Hope.

feature.name: Dive-Bomb - Action
feature.text: If the Obsidian Predator is flying, **mark a Stress** to choose a point within Far range. Move to that point and make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take **2d10+6** physical damage and must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.

feature.name: Erupting Rage (Phase Change) - Reaction
feature.text: When the Obsidian Predator marks their last HP, replace them with the Molten Scourge and immediately spotlight them.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Defend lair, dive-bomb, fly, hunt, intimidate

feature.name: Relentless (3) - Passive
feature.text: The Molten Scourge can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Cracked Scales - Passive
feature.text: When the Molten Scourge takes damage, roll a number of **d6s** equal to HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.

feature.name: Shattering Might - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes **4d8+1** physical damage, loses a Hope, and is knocked back to Close range. The Molten Scourge clears a Stress.

feature.name: Eruption - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to erupt lava from beneath the Molten Scourge's scales, filling the area within Very Close range with molten lava. All targets in that area must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take **4d6+6** physical damage and be knocked back to Close range. This area remains lava. When a creature other than the Molten Scourge enters that area or acts while inside of it, they must mark 6 HP.

feature.name: Volcanic Breath - Reaction
feature.text: When the Molten Scourge takes Major damage, roll a **d10**. On a result of 8 or higher, the Molten Scourge breathes a flow of lava in front of them within Far range. All targets in that area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **2d10+4** physical damage, mark **1d4 Stress**, and are _Vulnerable_ until they clear a Stress. Targets who succeed take half damage and must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Lava Splash - Reaction
feature.text: When the Molten Scourge takes Severe damage from an attack within Very Close range, molten blood gushes from the wound and deals **2d10+4** direct physical damage to the attacker.

feature.name: Ashen Vengeance (Phase Change) - Reaction
feature.text: When the Molten Scourge marks their last HP, replace them with the Ashen Tyrant and immediately spotlight them.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Douse with lava, incinerate, repel Invaders, reposition
monsters.name: Volcanic Dragon: Molten Scourge

monsters.description: No enemy has ever had the insolence to wound the dragon so. As the lava settles, it's ground to ash like the dragon's past foes.

feature.name: Relentless (4) - Passive
feature.text: The Ashen Tyrant can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Cornered - Passive
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** instead of spending a Fear to spotlight the Ashen Tyrant.

feature.name: Injured Wings - Passive
feature.text: While flying, the Ashen Tyrant gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.

feature.name: Ashes to Ashes - Passive
feature.text: When a PC rolls a failure while within Close range of the Ashen Tyrant, they lose a Hope and you gain a Fear. If the PC can't lose a Hope, they must mark a HP.

feature.name: Desperate Rampage - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Ashen Tyrant succeeds against take **2d20+2** physical damage, are knocked back to Close range of where they were, and must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Ashen Cloud - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to smash the ground and kick up ash within Far range. While within the ash cloud, a target has disadvantage on action rolls. The ash cloud clears the next time an adversary is spotlighted.

feature.name: Apocalyptic Thrashing - Action: Countdown (1d12)
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to activate. It ticks down when a PC rolls with Fear. When it triggers, the Ashen Tyrant thrashes about, causing environmental damage (such as an earthquake, avalanche, or collapsing walls). All targets within Far range must make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take **2d10+10** physical damage and are _Restrained_ by the rubble until they break free with a successful Strength Roll. Targets who succeed take half damage. If the Ashen Tyrant is defeated while this countdown is active, trigger the countdown immediately as the destruction caused by their death throes.

monsters.motives_and_tactics: Choke, fly, intimidate, kill or be killed
monsters.name: Volcanic Dragon: Ashen Tyrant

feature.name: Spit Acid - Action

feature.name: Acid Bath - Reaction

feature.text: The Flickerfly can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

feature.name: Never Misses - Passive
feature.text: When the Flickerfly makes an attack, the target's Evasion is halved against the attack.

feature.name: Deadly Flight - Passive
feature.text: While flying, the Flickerfly can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.

feature.name: Whirlwind - Action
feature.text: **Spend a Fear** to whirl, making an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Flickerfly succeeds against take **3d8** direct physical damage.

feature.name: Mind Dance - Action
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to create a magically dazzling display that grapples the minds of nearby foes. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. For each target who failed, you gain a Fear and the Flickerfly learns one of the target's fears.

feature.name: Hallucinatory Breath - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 1d6)
feature.text: When the Flickerfly takes damage for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, the Flickerfly breathes hallucinatory gas on all targets in front of them up to Far range. Targets must make an Instinct Reaction Roll or be tormented by fearful hallucinations. Targets whose fears are known to the Flickerfly have disadvantage on this roll. Targets who fail lose 2 Hope and take **3d8+3** direct magic damage.

feature.name: Uncanny Reflexes - Reaction
feature.text: When the Flickerfly takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can **mark a Stress** to take half damage.
